approve_date.text: ที่สมัครระหว่างวันที่

root.sql: SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AS memname ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no || ' - ' || sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AS membership_no_sum ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type -- sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.memtype_control, -- sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_application_form.mobile_number ,sc_mem_m_application_form.remark ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) AS age ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,'dd Month yyyy') date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , -- sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type, -- sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) AS group_control ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ,( SELECT description FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position WHERE group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ) AS group_position_desc ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long AS position_name ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id ,nvl(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount, 0) AS salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_id ,( SELECT sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no) AND (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no) AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFE' AND sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AS item_amount ,to_date('2025-8-1 0:0:0', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AS approve_date_full ,'!memtype_control!' AS memtype_control_full ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no_ref) as ref_memname ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code) as district_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_com_m_branch ,sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr --sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id) AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no -- and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type --and to_char(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'MM') = '07' --and to_char(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'YYYY') = '2020' /*---------------------[ ที่สมัครระหว่างวันที่ ]------------------------*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date between to_date('2025-8-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2025-8-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
